scripts.build: echo 'Building app app-34...' && sleep 3.0 && echo 'Webpack: compiled successfully' && echo 'app-34 ready!' && mkdir -p dist && date > dist/.stamp
scripts.dev: echo 'app-34 started on http://localhost:8004' && while true; do sleep 1; echo '[app-34] GET / 200 12ms'; done
scripts.test: echo 'E2E tests for app-34...' && sleep 0.8 && echo '  12 tests passed, 0 failed'
